mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBP.POST_CREATE_AT, TBP.POST_TAG, TBP.USER_ID, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_PROFILE, NVL(TBPLC.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, CASE WHEN TBPLU.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_LIKED, NVL(TBCC.COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_USER TBU ON TBP.USER_ID = TBU.ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_POST_LIKE GROUP BY POST_ID ) TBPLC ON TBP.ID = TBPLC.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPLU ON TBP.ID = TBPLU.POST_ID AND TBPLU.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT POST_ID, COUNT(POST_ID) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM TBL_COMMENT GROUP BY POST_ID ) TBCC ON TBP.ID = TBCC.POST_ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
